scripts.zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$v=(Get-Content manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json).version; $out=\"controlinject-v$v.zip\"; if(Test-Path $out){Remove-Item $out -Force}; Compress-Archive -Path manifest.json,background.js,content.js,imagedb.js,matcher.js,modal-seleccion.js,ocr-engine.js,options.html,options.js,page-inject-confirm-patch.js,panel.css,panel.html,panel.js,pdf-splitter.js,storage.js,vencimientos.js,icons -DestinationPath $out -Force; Write-Host \"ZIP creado: $out\""
